vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is partially accurate but incomplete. P1 (Yellow pot) contains String of Nickels. P2/P4 (Black pot, shared) contains Mexican Mint and Silver Guest. P3 (Black pot with rabbit) contains Pothos. A significant systemic loss is noted regarding the Pothos specimen.

inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss (Pothos specimen is absent/withered; only the rabbit anchor remains)
inventory_reconciliation.New_Intervention: Presence of debris/eggshell fragments in P3 and P2/P4 soil.

plant_audit.P1: String of Nickels: Stable, low-light adapted, minimal growth.
plant_audit.P2/P4: Mexican Mint/Silver Guest: Showing signs of chlorosis and stunted development.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos: Deceased. The pot is effectively empty save for the rabbit anchor and soil debris.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently damp with high organic debris content.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-4: Minimal change; slight leaf drooping in P3.
temporal_deltas.T-4_to_T-3: P3 leaf shows signs of necrotic browning.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_T-1: P3 leaf is now essentially a shriveled remnant.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: P3 leaf has fully detached or decomposed; only the rabbit remains.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: P1 is stable. P2/P4 is struggling with light deficiency. P3 is a total loss due to likely overwatering or root rot, evidenced by the rapid collapse of the foliage.
vision_report.anomalies: Presence of white particulate matter (likely eggshell) in the soil of P3 and P2/P4, suggesting an unrecorded soil amendment intervention.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of decline. While the String of Nickels (P1) remains dormant and stable, the Pothos (P3) has suffered a complete systemic failure, leaving the rabbit anchor isolated. The shared pot (P2/P4) shows signs of nutrient or light stress. The introduction of eggshell fragments indicates an attempt to rectify soil health, but it has not prevented the loss of the Pothos.
